title: DFC Master Index
description: The top-level _index.json file, which acts as the entry point for accessing the exported data.

system.description: Relative path from the exported root to the system index file.

fleets.description: Relative paths from the exported root to each fleet index file.

other_ships.description: Relative paths from the exported root to other ship category index files (civilian, misc).

counts_as.description: Relative path from the exported root to the 'counts as' index file.
